definition:
1. to have gone before, be the first , (Thucydides) 
2. to have advanced , πρ. ἐς βαθὺ τῆς ἡλικίας (Aristophanes Comicus); εἰς τοῦτο προήκειν to have come  to this pass, (Demosthenes Orator); of Time, τῆς ἡμέρας προηκούσας (Plutarch) 
3. to reach beyond , τῆς ἄρκυος (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
